name: TwilioCall
description: Structure documentation for the Twilio Call resource returned by the Voice API

fields.name: sid
fields.description: Unique call identifier with CA prefix

fields.name: account_sid
fields.description: Account SID that owns this call

fields.name: to
fields.description: Phone number that received the call

fields.name: to_formatted
fields.description: Formatted version of the to phone number

fields.name: from
fields.description: Phone number that initiated the call

fields.name: from_formatted
fields.description: Formatted version of the from phone number

fields.name: phone_number_sid
fields.description: SID of the Twilio phone number used

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current call status: queued, ringing, in-progress, completed, busy, failed, no-answer, canceled

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: RFC 2822 timestamp when the call began

fields.name: end_time
fields.description: RFC 2822 timestamp when the call ended

fields.name: answered_by
fields.description: Whether call was answered by human or machine

fields.name: forwarded_from
fields.description: Number the call was forwarded from
